body:
The goal of this is PR to allow `NonhydrostaticModel` to have grids that are irregularly-spaced in either the `x` or the `y` directions (in addition to grids that are irregularly-spaced in the `z`, which we already allow).

The first step was https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/3117, which is now merged. Now the rest of the work is to generalize `FourierTridiagonalPoissonSolver` to other dimensions.

Closes https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/issues/3116
title: Allowing `NonhydrostaticModel` with grids that are irregular in either `x` or `y`
